evals.prompt: Look up BETC-Downright Smashing-Schiller for 18+ 3.0 and create a scouting report
evals.expected_output: A .docx scouting report with full Boeing roster (18 players with DRs and C/S types), 3 completed match tables showing both team lineups with C/S next to every player name, and a strategy section. Christa Hansma should be flagged as Self-Rated (S). Nikki Wildfang and Flavia Storelli should be flagged as not yet played.

evals.prompt: Look up ETC-Fresh off the Court-Zhu/Walsh for 18+ 3.5 and make a scouting report
evals.expected_output: A .docx scouting report for ETC-Fresh off the Court-Zhu/Walsh in the 18+ 3.5 league. Should include full roster with DRs and C/S types, all completed match tables with both teams shown court by court, players flagged as not yet played, and strategy notes.
